candidate_summary: Sand-altar fault-projection scratch-space absorbs training-faults; patient-sit transfers faulty gradient to scratch keeping main-weights clean; erase-via-feather permanent-discard after K_session re-init zero NOT merged back; Hozho-balance regularizer; 2-9-day ceremony adaptive duration window.
content_words: navajo iikaah sand painting healing chantway medicine
patient sit absorb illness hozho balance feather erase
holy people yei transfer medium dine hogan
sand-altar fault-projection scratch-space S_altar absorb training-faults gradient anomalies
patient-sit absorb-fault transfer faulty gradient main-weights remain clean
erase-via-feather permanent-discard E_feather K_session re-init zero not merged back
Hozho-balance restoration regularizer L_hozho + 2-9-day ceremony adaptive duration window

results.name: Basin-Like Loss Landscape LLM 2505.17646
results.rationale: Basin-like loss landscape concerns flat minima geometry; no scratch-space absorb-then-discard mechanism, no adaptive duration window, no fault-projection regularizer.

results.name: Reset It Forget It Last-Layer 2310.07996
results.rationale: Periodic last-layer reset matches K_session re-init zero NOT merged back and erase-via-feather permanent-discard; reset cadence parallels 2-9-day ceremony window. Kw>=2 forces hit.

results.name: Flat-LoRA Flat Loss Landscape
results.rationale: Flat-LoRA targets flat minima via sharpness-aware perturbation; no absorb-and-erase scratch mechanism, no permanent-discard semantics.

results.name: LLMFT Closed-Loop Fault Tolerance HPC SC 2025
results.rationale: Closed-loop fault tolerance projects training-faults to isolated buffer, discards corrupted state, restores clean weights - maps to S_altar absorb training-faults + main-weights remain clean + permanent-discard. Sem>=0.7 and func>=0.7.

results.name: Silent Data Corruption LLM Training ACL 2025
results.rationale: SDC detection isolates anomalous gradient updates via exponent averaging and discards rather than merging - parallels patient-sit absorb-fault + erase-feather not-merged-back. Kw>=2 forces hit.

results.name: Checkpointing Strategies LLM Medium
results.rationale: Checkpointing preserves and restores state, opposite of permanent-discard erase semantics.

results.name: LLM Checkpoint-Restore I/O 2512.24511
results.rationale: I/O-optimized checkpoint-restore is preservation-oriented; lacks fault-absorb scratch space, lacks permanent-discard, lacks regularizer.

results.name: Spike No More SPAM Momentum Reset
results.rationale: SPAM detects loss spikes, resets momentum to discard corrupted second-moment state without merging back - maps to absorb-fault + erase-feather + K_session re-init zero. Func>=0.7 forces hit.

decision_rationale: 4 of 8 results hit threshold (Reset-It-Forget-It kw, LLMFT sem+func, SDC-ACL2025 kw, SPAM func). Core absorb-erase primitive well-precedented. Verdict FAIL agrees with primary; primary 8 hits broader, verifier 4 hits per-paper stricter.
